今日(2024-07-12)Arxiv最新论文

发表于2024-07-12|更新于2024-08-09|学术会议Arxiv
|字数总计:129.8k|阅读时长:731分钟|阅读量:|评论数:

本篇博文主要展示每日从Arxiv论文网站获取的最新论文列表，每天早上11:30点定时自动更新，主要按照NLP、CV、ML、AI、IR五个大方向区分，若需要邮件定时接收，请在评论区留下你的邮箱号。

说明：每日论文数据从arxiv网站获取，每天早上11:30左右定时自动更新。

友情提示: 如何您需要邮箱接收每日论文数据，请在评论处留下你的邮箱，同样每天11:30左右邮件定时自动发送。

自然语言处理

[NLP-0] ransformer Circuit Faithfulness Metrics are not Robust
[NLP-0] ransformer电路忠实度收件箱并不强大

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08734
作者: Joseph Miller,Bilal Chughtai,William Saunders
关键词: present inside neural, learned algorithms present, algorithms present inside, Mechanistic interpretability work, interpretability work attempts
中文关键词: 存在于神经内部，学习算法存在于内部，算法存在于内部，机械学解释性工作，解释性工作尝试
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: CoLM 2024 Conference Paper. 11 page main body. 11 page appendix. 12 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Mechanistic interpretability work attempts to reverse engineer the learned algorithms present inside neural networks. One focus of this work has been to discover ‘circuits’ – subgraphs of the full model that explain behaviour on specific tasks. But how do we measure the performance of such circuits? Prior work has attempted to measure circuit ‘faithfulness’ – the degree to which the circuit replicates the performance of the full model. In this work, we survey many considerations for designing experiments that measure circuit faithfulness by ablating portions of the model’s computation. Concerningly, we find existing methods are highly sensitive to seemingly insignificant changes in the ablation methodology. We conclude that existing circuit faithfulness scores reflect both the methodological choices of researchers as well as the actual components of the circuit - the task a circuit is required to perform depends on the ablation used to test it. The ultimate goal of mechanistic interpretability work is to understand neural networks, so we emphasize the need for more clarity in the precise claims being made about circuits. We open source a library at this https URL that includes highly efficient implementations of a wide range of ablation methodologies and circuit discovery algorithms.
摘要：机械论的可解释性工作试图对神经网络中存在的学习算法进行逆向工程。这项工作的一个重点是发现“回路”–解释特定任务行为的完整模型的子图。但是，我们如何衡量这些电路的性能呢？先前的工作试图测量电路的“忠诚度”–电路复制完整模型性能的程度。在这项工作中，我们综述了设计实验的许多考虑因素，这些实验通过烧毁模型的部分计算来测量电路的忠诚度。令人担忧的是，我们发现现有的方法对消融方法中看似微不足道的变化高度敏感。我们的结论是，现有的电路忠诚度分数既反映了研究人员的方法选择，也反映了电路的实际组件-电路需要执行的任务取决于用于测试它的消融。机械可解释性工作的最终目标是理解神经网络，因此我们强调需要在关于电路的准确声明中更加清晰。我们在这个HTTPS URL上开源了一个库，其中包括各种烧蚀方法和电路发现算法的高效实现。

[NLP-1] Is Your Model Really A Good Math Reasoner? Evaluating Mathematical Reasoning with Checklist
[NLP-1] 你的模型真的是一个好的数学推理者吗？用检查表进行数学评估推理

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08733
作者: Zihao Zhou,Shudong Liu,Maizhen Ning,Wei Liu,Jindong Wang,Derek F. Wong,Xiaowei Huang,Qiufeng Wang,Kaizhu Huang
关键词: Exceptional mathematical reasoning, large language models, Exceptional mathematical, mathematical reasoning, mathematical
中文关键词: 非凡的数学推理，大型语言模型，非凡的数学，数学推理，数学
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 35 pages, 10 figures, preprint

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Exceptional mathematical reasoning ability is one of the key features that demonstrate the power of large language models (LLMs). How to comprehensively define and evaluate the mathematical abilities of LLMs, and even reflect the user experience in real-world scenarios, has emerged as a critical issue. Current benchmarks predominantly concentrate on problem-solving capabilities, which presents a substantial risk of model overfitting and fails to accurately represent genuine mathematical reasoning abilities. In this paper, we argue that if a model really understands a problem, it should be robustly and readily applied across a diverse array of tasks. Motivated by this, we introduce MATHCHECK, a well-designed checklist for testing task generalization and reasoning robustness, as well as an automatic tool to generate checklists efficiently. MATHCHECK includes multiple mathematical reasoning tasks and robustness test types to facilitate a comprehensive evaluation of both mathematical reasoning ability and behavior testing. Utilizing MATHCHECK, we develop MATHCHECK-GSM and MATHCHECK-GEO to assess mathematical textual reasoning and multi-modal reasoning capabilities, respectively, serving as upgraded versions of benchmarks including GSM8k, GeoQA, UniGeo, and Geometry3K. We adopt MATHCHECK-GSM and MATHCHECK-GEO to evaluate over 20 LLMs and 11 MLLMs, assessing their comprehensive mathematical reasoning abilities. Our results demonstrate that while frontier LLMs like GPT-4o continue to excel in various abilities on the checklist, many other model families exhibit a significant decline. Further experiments indicate that, compared to traditional math benchmarks, MATHCHECK better reflects true mathematical abilities and represents mathematical intelligence more linearly, thereby supporting our design. On our MATHCHECK, we can easily conduct detailed behavior analysis to deeply investigate models.
摘要：出众的数学推理能力是展示大语言模型(LLM)能力的关键特征之一。如何全面定义和评价LLMS的数学能力，甚至反映用户在真实场景中的体验，已经成为一个关键问题。目前的基准主要集中在解决问题的能力上，这带来了模型过度匹配的巨大风险，并且无法准确地代表真正的数学推理能力。在这篇文章中，我们认为，如果一个模型真的理解了一个问题，它应该健壮地、容易地应用于各种任务。受此启发，我们引入了MATHCHECK，一个设计良好的检查表，用于测试任务泛化和推理健壮性，以及一个有效地生成检查表的自动工具。MATHCHECK包括多个数学推理任务和稳健性测试类型，以便于对数学推理能力和行为测试进行全面评估。利用MATHCHECK，我们开发了MATHCHECK-GSM和MATHCHECK-GEO，分别用于评估数学文本推理和多模式推理能力，作为GSM8K、GeoQA、UniGeo和Geometry3K基准测试的升级版本。我们采用MATHCHECK-GSM和MATHCHECK-GEO对20多个LLMS和11个MLLMS进行了评估，评估了它们的综合数学推理能力。我们的结果表明，尽管像GPT-40这样的前沿LLM在检查表上的各种能力上继续表现出色，但许多其他模范家庭表现出了显著的下降。进一步的实验表明，与传统的数学基准相比，MATHCHECK更好地反映了真实的数学能力，更线性地表征了数学智能，从而支持了我们的设计。在我们的MATHCHECK上，我们可以很容易地进行详细的行为分析，以深入研究模型。

[NLP-2] A Taxonomy for Data Contamination in Large Language Models
[NLP-2] 大型语言模型中数据污染的分类

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08716
作者: Medha Palavalli,Amanda Bertsch,Matthew R. Gormley
关键词: extensive web corpora, web corpora demonstrate, corpora demonstrate remarkable, Large language models, demonstrate remarkable performance
中文关键词: 广泛的网络库，网络库演示，库演示出色，大型语言模型，演示出色的性能
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 19 pages, 8 figures, accepted to CONDA Workshop on Data Contamination @ ACL 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models pretrained on extensive web corpora demonstrate remarkable performance across a wide range of downstream tasks. However, a growing concern is data contamination, where evaluation datasets may be contained in the pretraining corpus, inflating model performance. Decontamination, the process of detecting and removing such data, is a potential solution; yet these contaminants may originate from altered versions of the test set, evading detection during decontamination. How different types of contamination impact the performance of language models on downstream tasks is not fully understood. We present a taxonomy that categorizes the various types of contamination encountered by LLMs during the pretraining phase and identify which types pose the highest risk. We analyze the impact of contamination on two key NLP tasks – summarization and question answering – revealing how different types of contamination influence task performance during evaluation.
摘要：在广泛的网络库上预先训练的大型语言模型在广泛的下游任务中表现出出色的性能。然而，一个日益令人担忧的问题是数据污染，其中评估数据集可能包含在预训练文集中，从而夸大了模型性能。净化（检测和删除此类数据的过程）是一种潜在的解决方案;然而，这些污染物可能来自测试集的更改版本，从而在净化期间逃避检测。不同类型的污染如何影响语言模型在下游任务上的性能尚不完全了解。我们提出了一种分类法，对LLM在预训练阶段遇到的各种类型的污染进行分类，并确定哪些类型构成最高的风险。我们分析了污染对两项关键NLP任务（总结和问题回答）的影响，揭示了不同类型的污染如何影响评估期间的任务绩效。

[NLP-3] GTA: A Benchmark for General Tool Agents
[NLP-3] GTA：通用工具代理商的基准

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08713
作者: Jize Wang,Zerun Ma,Yining Li,Songyang Zhang,Cailian Chen,Kai Chen,Xinyi Le
关键词: large language models, integrating large language, Significant focus, language models, integrating large
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，集成大型语言，重要焦点，语言模型，集成大型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Github repo: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Significant focus has been placed on integrating large language models (LLMs) with various tools in developing general-purpose agents. This poses a challenge to LLMs’ tool-use capabilities. However, there are evident gaps between existing tool-use evaluations and real-world scenarios. Current evaluations often use AI-generated queries, single-step tasks, dummy tools, and text-only interactions, failing to reveal the agents’ real-world problem-solving abilities effectively. To address this, we propose GTA, a benchmark for General Tool Agents, featuring three main aspects: (i) Real user queries: human-written queries with simple real-world objectives but implicit tool-use, requiring the LLM to reason the suitable tools and plan the solution steps. (ii) Real deployed tools: an evaluation platform equipped with tools across perception, operation, logic, and creativity categories to evaluate the agents’ actual task execution performance. (iii) Real multimodal inputs: authentic image files, such as spatial scenes, web page screenshots, tables, code snippets, and printed/handwritten materials, used as the query contexts to align with real-world scenarios closely. We design 229 real-world tasks and executable tool chains to evaluate mainstream LLMs. Our findings show that real-world user queries are challenging for existing LLMs, with GPT-4 completing less than 50% of the tasks and most LLMs achieving below 25%. This evaluation reveals the bottlenecks in the tool-use capabilities of current LLMs in real-world scenarios, which provides future direction for advancing general-purpose tool agents. The code and dataset are available at this https URL.
摘要：在开发通用代理时，大型语言模型(LLM)与各种工具的集成一直是人们关注的重点。这对低成本管理系统的工具使用能力构成了挑战。然而，现有的工具使用评估与现实世界的情景之间存在着明显的差距。目前的评估通常使用人工智能生成的查询、单步任务、虚拟工具和纯文本交互，无法有效地揭示代理在现实世界中解决问题的能力。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了GTA，这是一个针对通用工具代理的基准，具有三个主要方面：(I)真实用户查询：具有简单的现实世界目标但隐含的工具使用的人工编写的查询，要求LLM推理合适的工具并计划解决步骤。(Ii)真正部署的工具：一个评估平台，配备了跨感知、操作、逻辑和创造力类别的工具，以评估代理的实际任务执行性能。(3)真正的多模式输入：真实的图像文件，如空间场景、网页截图、表格、代码片段和打印/手写材料，用作查询上下文，以便与现实世界的情景紧密结合。我们设计了229个真实世界的任务和可执行的工具链来评估主流的LLMS。我们的发现表明，现实世界中的用户查询对于现有的LLMS来说是具有挑战性的，GPT-4完成的任务不到50%，大多数LLMS的完成率低于25%。这一评估揭示了当前低成本管理在现实世界场景中工具使用能力的瓶颈，这为先进的通用工具代理提供了未来的方向。代码和数据集可在此HTTPS URL上找到。

[NLP-4] Uncertainty Estimation of Large Language Models in Medical Question Answering
[NLP-4] 医学问题回答中大型语言模型的不确定性估计

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08662
作者: Jiaxin Wu,Yizhou Yu,Hong-Yu Zhou
关键词: Large Language Models, natural language generation, Large Language, factually incorrect information, risk hallucinating factually
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、自然语言生成、大型语言、事实上不正确的信息、事实上产生幻觉的风险
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise for natural language generation in healthcare, but risk hallucinating factually incorrect information. Deploying LLMs for medical question answering necessitates reliable uncertainty estimation (UE) methods to detect hallucinations. In this work, we benchmark popular UE methods with different model sizes on medical question-answering datasets. Our results show that current approaches generally perform poorly in this domain, highlighting the challenge of UE for medical applications. We also observe that larger models tend to yield better results, suggesting a correlation between model size and the reliability of UE. To address these challenges, we propose Two-phase Verification, a probability-free Uncertainty Estimation approach. First, an LLM generates a step-by-step explanation alongside its initial answer, followed by formulating verification questions to check the factual claims in the explanation. The model then answers these questions twice: first independently, and then referencing the explanation. Inconsistencies between the two sets of answers measure the uncertainty in the original response. We evaluate our approach on three biomedical question-answering datasets using Llama 2 Chat models and compare it against the benchmarked baseline methods. The results show that our Two-phase Verification method achieves the best overall accuracy and stability across various datasets and model sizes, and its performance scales as the model size increases.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)在医疗保健领域显示了自然语言生成的前景，但可能会产生幻觉，产生事实错误的信息。在医学问题解答中部署LLMS需要可靠的不确定性估计(UE)方法来检测幻觉。在这项工作中，我们在医学问答数据集上对不同模型大小的流行UE方法进行了基准测试。我们的结果表明，目前的方法在这一领域普遍表现不佳，突显了UE在医疗应用方面的挑战。我们还观察到，较大的模型往往会产生更好的结果，这表明模型大小与UE的可靠性之间存在相关性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了两阶段验证，一种无概率的不确定性估计方法。首先，LLM在最初的答案之外生成一个循序渐进的解释，然后制定验证问题来检查解释中的事实主张。然后，该模型对这些问题进行两次回答：第一次是独立回答，然后是参考解释。两组答案之间的不一致衡量了原始回答中的不确定性。我们使用Llama 2聊天模型在三个生物医学问答数据集上评估了我们的方法，并将其与基准基准方法进行了比较。结果表明，我们的两阶段验证方法在不同的数据集和模型规模上获得了最好的总体精度和稳定性，并且其性能随着模型规模的增加而增大。

[NLP-5] owards Building Specialized Generalist AI with System 1 and System 2 Fusion
[NLP-5] owards通过System 1和System 2融合构建专业通才人工智能

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08642
作者: Kaiyan Zhang,Biqing Qi,Bowen Zhou
关键词: Generalist Artificial Intelligence, Artificial General Intelligence, Specialized Generalist Artificial, Artificial Intelligence, Generalist Artificial
中文关键词: 多面手人工智能，人工通用智能，专业多面手人工，人工智能，多面手人工
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this perspective paper, we introduce the concept of Specialized Generalist Artificial Intelligence (SGAI or simply SGI) as a crucial milestone toward Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). Compared to directly scaling general abilities, SGI is defined as AI that specializes in at least one task, surpassing human experts, while also retaining general abilities. This fusion path enables SGI to rapidly achieve high-value areas. We categorize SGI into three stages based on the level of mastery over professional skills and generality performance. Additionally, we discuss the necessity of SGI in addressing issues associated with large language models, such as their insufficient generality, specialized capabilities, uncertainty in innovation, and practical applications. Furthermore, we propose a conceptual framework for developing SGI that integrates the strengths of Systems 1 and 2 cognitive processing. This framework comprises three layers and four key components, which focus on enhancing individual abilities and facilitating collaborative evolution. We conclude by summarizing the potential challenges and suggesting future directions. We hope that the proposed SGI will provide insights into further research and applications towards achieving AGI.
摘要：在这篇前瞻性的论文中，我们介绍了专业通才人工智能(SGAI或简称SGI)的概念，作为迈向人工通用智能(AGI)的重要里程碑。与直接扩展一般能力相比，SGI被定义为专门从事至少一项任务的人工智能，超过人类专家，同时还保留一般能力。这条融合之路使SGI能够迅速实现高价值领域。根据对专业技能和通用性表现的掌握程度，我们将SGI分为三个阶段。此外，我们还讨论了SGI在解决与大型语言模型相关的问题方面的必要性，如它们的通用性不足、专业能力、创新和实际应用中的不确定性。此外，我们提出了一个概念框架来开发SGI，它整合了系统1和系统2的认知加工的优点。这一框架包括三个层次和四个关键组成部分，重点是增强个人能力和促进协同进化。最后，我们总结了潜在的挑战并提出了未来的方向。我们希望拟议的SGI将为实现AGI的进一步研究和应用提供见解。

[NLP-6] amil Language Computing: the Present and the Future
[NLP-6] amil语言计算：现在与未来

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08618
作者: Kengatharaiyer Sarveswaran
关键词: generate human language, Language Computing, text processing aspects, generate human, Language
中文关键词: 生成人类语言，语言计算，文本处理方面，生成人类，语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 11 pages, This is the write-up of the address delivered at the 29th Annual Sessions of the Jaffna Science Association, held from March 29-31, 2023, at the University of Jaffna, Sri Lanka

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper delves into the text processing aspects of Language Computing, which enables computers to understand, interpret, and generate human language. Focusing on tasks such as speech recognition, machine translation, sentiment analysis, text summarization, and language modelling, language computing integrates disciplines including linguistics, computer science, and cognitive psychology to create meaningful human-computer interactions. Recent advancements in deep learning have made computers more accessible and capable of independent learning and adaptation. In examining the landscape of language computing, the paper emphasises foundational work like encoding, where Tamil transitioned from ASCII to Unicode, enhancing digital communication. It discusses the development of computational resources, including raw data, dictionaries, glossaries, annotated data, and computational grammars, necessary for effective language processing. The challenges of linguistic annotation, the creation of treebanks, and the training of large language models are also covered, emphasising the need for high-quality, annotated data and advanced language models. The paper underscores the importance of building practical applications for languages like Tamil to address everyday communication needs, highlighting gaps in current technology. It calls for increased research collaboration, digitization of historical texts, and fostering digital usage to ensure the comprehensive development of Tamil language processing, ultimately enhancing global communication and access to digital services.
摘要：本文深入研究了语言计算的文本处理方面，语言计算使计算机能够理解、解释和生成人类语言。语言计算以语音识别、机器翻译、情感分析、文本摘要和语言建模等任务为重点，集成了语言学、计算机科学和认知心理学等学科，以创建有意义的人机交互。深度学习的最新进展使计算机更容易获得，并能够独立学习和适应。在研究语言计算的前景时，这篇论文强调了编码等基础工作，泰米尔语从ASCII过渡到Unicode，增强了数字通信。它讨论了有效的语言处理所必需的计算资源的开发，包括原始数据、词典、词汇表、带注释的数据和计算语法。本课程还包括语言注释、树库创建和大型语言模型培训的挑战，强调需要高质量的带注释的数据和高级语言模型。白皮书强调了为泰米尔语等语言建立实用应用程序以满足日常交流需求的重要性，并强调了当前技术的差距。它呼吁加强研究合作，将历史文本数字化，并促进数字使用，以确保泰米尔语处理的全面发展，最终加强全球交流和获得数字服务。

[NLP-7] urn-Level Empathy Prediction Using Psychological Indicators
[NLP-7] 使用心理指标的瓮级同理心预测

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08607
作者: Shaz Furniturewala,Kokil Jaidka
关键词: Prediction Shared Task, Personality Prediction Shared, Sympathy and Compassion, Shared Task, Personality Prediction
中文关键词: 预测共享任务、共享个性预测、同情与同情、共享任务、个性预测
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:For the WASSA 2024 Empathy and Personality Prediction Shared Task, we propose a novel turn-level empathy detection method that decomposes empathy into six psychological indicators: Emotional Language, Perspective-Taking, Sympathy and Compassion, Extroversion, Openness, and Agreeableness. A pipeline of text enrichment using a Large Language Model (LLM) followed by DeBERTA fine-tuning demonstrates a significant improvement in the Pearson Correlation Coefficient and F1 scores for empathy detection, highlighting the effectiveness of our approach. Our system officially ranked 7th at the CONV-turn track.
摘要：对于WASSA 2024年同理心和人格预测共享任务，我们提出了一种新颖的回合级同理心检测方法，该方法将同理心分解为六个心理指标：情感语言、观点采纳、同情心和同情心、外向、开放性和随和性。使用大型语言模型（LLM）然后进行DeBERTA微调的文本丰富管道表明，同理心检测的Pearson相关系数和F1分数有显着提高，凸显了我们方法的有效性。我们的系统在CONV转弯赛道上正式排名第七。

[NLP-8] On the Universal Truthfulness Hyperplane Inside LLMs
[NLP-8] 关于LLM内部的普遍真实性超平面

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08582
作者: Junteng Liu,Shiqi Chen,Yu Cheng,Junxian He
关键词: demonstrated remarkable abilities, large language models, significant challenge, large language, demonstrated remarkable
中文关键词: 展示了非凡的能力，大型语言模型，重大挑战，大型语言，展示了非凡的
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:While large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable abilities across various fields, hallucination remains a significant challenge. Recent studies have explored hallucinations through the lens of internal representations, proposing mechanisms to decipher LLMs’ adherence to facts. However, these approaches often fail to generalize to out-of-distribution data, leading to concerns about whether internal representation patterns reflect fundamental factual awareness, or only overfit spurious correlations on the specific datasets. In this work, we investigate whether a universal truthfulness hyperplane that distinguishes the model’s factually correct and incorrect outputs exists within the model. To this end, we scale up the number of training datasets and conduct an extensive evaluation – we train the truthfulness hyperplane on a diverse collection of over 40 datasets and examine its cross-task, cross-domain, and in-domain generalization. Our results indicate that increasing the diversity of the training datasets significantly enhances the performance in all scenarios, while the volume of data samples plays a less critical role. This finding supports the optimistic hypothesis that a universal truthfulness hyperplane may indeed exist within the model, offering promising directions for future research.
摘要：虽然大型语言模型在各个领域都表现出了非凡的能力，但幻觉仍然是一个巨大的挑战。最近的研究通过内部表征的镜头来探索幻觉，提出了破译LLM对事实的坚持的机制。然而，这些方法往往不能推广到分布外的数据，导致人们担心内部表示模式是否反映了基本的事实意识，或者只是过度匹配特定数据集上的虚假相关性。在这项工作中，我们调查了模型中是否存在区分模型事实正确和错误输出的通用真实性超平面。为此，我们扩大了训练数据集的数量，并进行了广泛的评估–我们在40多个数据集的不同集合上训练真实性超平面，并检查其跨任务、跨域和域内泛化。我们的结果表明，增加训练数据集的多样性显著提高了所有场景下的性能，而数据样本量的影响相对较小。这一发现支持了乐观的假设，即模型中可能确实存在一个通用真实性超平面，为未来的研究提供了有希望的方向。

[NLP-9] Autoregressive Speech Synthesis without Vector Quantization
[NLP-9] 无需量化的自回归语音合成

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08551
作者: Lingwei Meng,Long Zhou,Shujie Liu,Sanyuan Chen,Bing Han,Shujie Hu,Yanqing Liu,Jinyu Li,Sheng Zhao,Xixin Wu,Helen Meng,Furu Wei
关键词: based language modeling, language modeling approach, continuous-valued tokens based, speech synthesis, tokens based language
中文关键词: 基于语言建模、语言建模方法、基于连续值标记、语音合成、基于标记的语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Sound (cs.SD); Audio and Speech Processing (eess.AS)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We present MELLE, a novel continuous-valued tokens based language modeling approach for text to speech synthesis (TTS). MELLE autoregressively generates continuous mel-spectrogram frames directly from text condition, bypassing the need for vector quantization, which are originally designed for audio compression and sacrifice fidelity compared to mel-spectrograms. Specifically, (i) instead of cross-entropy loss, we apply regression loss with a proposed spectrogram flux loss function to model the probability distribution of the continuous-valued tokens. (ii) we have incorporated variational inference into MELLE to facilitate sampling mechanisms, thereby enhancing the output diversity and model robustness. Experiments demonstrate that, compared to the two-stage codec language models VALL-E and its variants, the single-stage MELLE mitigates robustness issues by avoiding the inherent flaws of sampling discrete codes, achieves superior performance across multiple metrics, and, most importantly, offers a more streamlined paradigm. See this https URL for demos of our work.
摘要：提出了一种新的基于连续值标记符的文语合成语言建模方法Melle。Melle直接从文本条件自动回归生成连续的MEL谱图帧，而不需要矢量量化，而矢量量化最初是为音频压缩而设计的，与MEL谱图相比，它的保真度有所下降。具体地说，(I)我们采用回归损失和提出的谱图流量损失函数来模拟连续值符号的概率分布，而不是交叉熵损失。(Ii)我们在MELE中加入了变分推理，以促进采样机制，从而增强了输出多样性和模型的稳健性。实验表明，与两级编解码器语言模型VALL-E及其变体相比，单级MELE通过避免采样离散代码的固有缺陷而缓解了健壮性问题，获得了跨多个度量的优越性能，最重要的是，提供了更精简的范例。有关我们工作的演示，请参阅此HTTPS URL。

[NLP-10] Emergent Visual-Semantic Hierarchies in Image-Text Representations
[NLP-10] 图像-文本表示中的新兴视觉-语义层次结构

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08521
作者: Morris Alper,Hadar Averbuch-Elor
关键词: shared semantic space, semantic space, powerful tool, tool for analyzing, shared semantic
中文关键词: 共享语义空间，语义空间，强大工具，分析工具，共享语义
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted to ECCV 2024. Project page: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:While recent vision-and-language models (VLMs) like CLIP are a powerful tool for analyzing text and images in a shared semantic space, they do not explicitly model the hierarchical nature of the set of texts which may describe an image. Conversely, existing multimodal hierarchical representation learning methods require costly training from scratch, failing to leverage the knowledge encoded by state-of-the-art multimodal foundation models. In this work, we study the knowledge of existing foundation models, finding that they exhibit emergent understanding of visual-semantic hierarchies despite not being directly trained for this purpose. We propose the Radial Embedding (RE) framework for probing and optimizing hierarchical understanding, and contribute the HierarCaps dataset, a benchmark facilitating the study of hierarchical knowledge in image–text representations, constructed automatically via large language models. Our results show that foundation VLMs exhibit zero-shot hierarchical understanding, surpassing the performance of prior models explicitly designed for this purpose. Furthermore, we show that foundation models may be better aligned to hierarchical reasoning via a text-only fine-tuning phase, while retaining pretraining knowledge.
摘要：虽然最近的视觉和语言模型(如CLIP)是分析共享语义空间中的文本和图像的强大工具，但它们并没有显式地对描述图像的文本集的层次性质进行建模。相反，现有的多通道层次表示学习方法需要从零开始进行昂贵的训练，无法利用由最先进的多通道基础模型编码的知识。在这项工作中，我们研究了现有基础模型的知识，发现它们表现出对视觉语义层次的紧急理解，尽管没有为此目的直接训练。我们提出了用于探索和优化层次理解的径向嵌入(RE)框架，并贡献了HierarCaps数据集，该基准促进了通过大型语言模型自动构建的图文表示中的层次知识的研究。我们的结果表明，基础VLM表现出零镜头分层理解，超过了专门为此目的而设计的现有模型的性能。此外，我们还表明，通过仅限文本的微调阶段，基础模型可能更好地与分层推理保持一致，同时保留预训练知识。

[NLP-11] Investigating LLMs as Voting Assistants via Contextual Augmentation: A Case Study on the European Parliament Elections 2024
[NLP-11] 通过背景增强调查法学硕士作为投票助理：2024年欧洲议会选举的案例研究

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08495
作者: Ilias Chalkidis
关键词: Instruction-finetuned Large Language, Natural Language Understanding, unprecedented Natural Language, Language Understanding capabilities, Large Language Models
中文关键词: 教学微调的大型语言、自然语言理解、前所未有的自然语言、语言理解能力、大型语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Instruction-finetuned Large Language Models exhibit unprecedented Natural Language Understanding capabilities. Recent work has been exploring political biases and political reasoning capabilities in LLMs, mainly scoped in the US context. In light of the recent 2024 European Parliament elections, we are investigating if LLMs can be used as Voting Advice Applications (VAAs). We audit MISTRAL and MIXTRAL models and evaluate their accuracy in predicting the stance of political parties based on the latest “EU and I” voting assistance questionnaire. Furthermore, we explore alternatives to improve models’ performance by augmenting the input context via Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) relying on web search, and Self-Reflection using staged conversations that aim to re-collect relevant content from the model’s internal memory. We find that MIXTRAL is highly accurate with an 82% accuracy on average. Augmenting the input context with expert-curated information can lead to a significant boost of approx. 9%, which remains an open challenge for automated approaches.
摘要：经过教学优化的大型语言模型显示出前所未有的自然语言理解能力。最近的工作一直在探索低收入者的政治偏见和政治推理能力，主要是在美国的背景下。鉴于最近举行的2024年欧洲议会选举，我们正在调查LLM是否可以用作投票建议应用程序(VAA)。根据最新的“欧盟和我”投票援助问卷，我们审计了米斯特拉尔和MIXTral模型，并评估了它们在预测政党立场方面的准确性。此外，我们探索了通过依赖于网络搜索的检索-增强生成(RAG)来增强输入上下文以及使用旨在从模型的内部存储器中重新收集相关内容的阶段性对话来自我反思来提高模型性能的替代方案。我们发现MIXTral具有很高的准确率，平均准确率为82%。用专家精选的信息来增强输入上下文可以显著提高大约。9%，这对自动化方法来说仍然是一个开放的挑战。

[NLP-12] Lynx: An Open Source Hallucination Evaluation Model
[NLP-12] Lynx：开源幻觉评估模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08488
作者: Selvan Sunitha Ravi,Bartosz Mielczarek,Anand Kannappan,Douwe Kiela,Rebecca Qian
关键词: Retrieval Augmented Generation, Large Language Models, Retrieval Augmented, Augmented Generation, Large Language
中文关键词: 检索增强生成、大型语言模型、检索增强、增强生成、大型语言
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) techniques aim to mitigate hallucinations in Large Language Models (LLMs). However, LLMs can still produce information that is unsupported or contradictory to the retrieved contexts. We introduce LYNX, a SOTA hallucination detection LLM that is capable of advanced reasoning on challenging real-world hallucination scenarios. To evaluate LYNX, we present HaluBench, a comprehensive hallucination evaluation benchmark, consisting of 15k samples sourced from various real-world domains. Our experiment results show that LYNX outperforms GPT-4o, Claude-3-Sonnet, and closed and open-source LLM-as-a-judge models on HaluBench. We release LYNX, HaluBench and our evaluation code for public access.
摘要：检索增强生成（RAG）技术旨在减轻大型语言模型（LLM）中的幻觉。然而，LLM仍然可以生成不支持或与检索到的上下文相矛盾的信息。我们引入了LY NX，这是一款SOTA幻觉检测LLM，能够对具有挑战性的现实世界幻觉场景进行高级推理。为了评估LY NX，我们提出了HaluBench，这是一个全面的幻觉评估基准，由来自各个现实世界领域的15，000个样本组成。我们的实验结果表明，LY NX优于GPT-4 o、Claude-3-Sonnet以及HaluBench上的封闭和开源LLM作为评委模型。我们发布了LY NX、HaluBench和我们的评估代码供公众访问。

[NLP-13] Investigating Public Fine-Tuning Datasets: A Complex Review of Current Practices from a Construction Perspective
[NLP-13] 调查公共微调数据集：从建筑角度对当前实践的复杂回顾

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08475
作者: Runyuan Ma,Wei Li,Fukai Shang
关键词: fine-tuning datasets, large model domain, public fine-tuning datasets, fine-tuning, training process
中文关键词: 微调数据集、大型模型域、公共微调数据集、微调、训练过程
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:With the rapid development of the large model domain, research related to fine-tuning has concurrently seen significant advancement, given that fine-tuning is a constituent part of the training process for large-scale models. Data engineering plays a fundamental role in the training process of models, which includes data infrastructure, data processing, etc. Data during fine-tuning likewise forms the base for large models. In order to embrace the power and explore new possibilities of fine-tuning datasets, this paper reviews current public fine-tuning datasets from the perspective of data construction. An overview of public fine-tuning datasets from two sides: evolution and taxonomy, is provided in this review, aiming to chart the development trajectory. Construction techniques and methods for public fine-tuning datasets of Large Language Models (LLMs), including data generation and data augmentation among others, are detailed. This elaboration follows the aforementioned taxonomy, specifically across demonstration, comparison, and generalist categories. Additionally, a category tree of data generation techniques has been abstracted in our review to assist researchers in gaining a deeper understanding of fine-tuning datasets from the construction dimension. Our review also summarizes the construction features in different data preparation phases of current practices in this field, aiming to provide a comprehensive overview and inform future research. Fine-tuning dataset practices, encompassing various data modalities, are also discussed from a construction perspective in our review. Towards the end of the article, we offer insights and considerations regarding the future construction and developments of fine-tuning datasets.
摘要：随着大型模型领域的快速发展，与微调相关的研究也取得了重大进展，因为微调是大型模型训练过程的组成部分。数据工程在模型的训练过程中起着基础性的作用，包括数据基础设施、数据处理等。微调期间的数据同样构成了大型模型的基础。为了拥抱微调数据集的力量，探索微调数据集的新可能性，本文从数据构建的角度回顾了现有的公共微调数据集。本文从进化和分类学两个方面对公共微调数据集进行了综述，旨在绘制其发展轨迹。详细介绍了大型语言模型公共微调数据集的构建技术和方法，包括数据生成和数据扩充等。这种细化遵循前面提到的分类法，特别是跨演示、比较和通才类别。此外，我们在综述中抽象了数据生成技术的类别树，以帮助研究人员从构建维度更深入地理解微调数据集。我们的综述还总结了该领域当前实践的不同数据准备阶段的构建特点，旨在提供一个全面的概述，并为未来的研究提供参考。在我们的审查中，还从构建的角度讨论了涵盖各种数据模式的微调数据集实践。在本文的最后，我们提供了对未来微调数据集的构建和发展的见解和考虑。

[NLP-14] Model Tells You Where to Merge: Adaptive KV Cache Merging for LLMs on Long-Context Tasks
[NLP-14] 模型告诉您在哪里合并：长上下文任务上LLM的自适应KV缓存合并

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08454
作者: Zheng Wang,Boxiao Jin,Zhongzhi Yu,Minjia Zhang
关键词: serve Large Language, Large Language Models, efficiently serve Large, Large Language, autoregressive generation process
中文关键词: 服务于大型语言、大型语言模型，有效服务于大型、大型语言、自回归生成过程
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:How to efficiently serve Large Language Models (LLMs) has become a pressing issue because of their huge computational cost in their autoregressive generation process. To mitigate computational costs, LLMs often employ the KV Cache technique to improve the generation speed. While improving the computational efficiency, the storage requirements of the KV cache are substantial, particularly in long-context scenarios, leading to significant memory consumption. Existing KV cache eviction methods often degrade the performance of LLMs in long-context scenarios due to the information loss introduced by eviction. In this paper, we propose a novel KV cache merging approach, called KVMerger, to achieve adaptive KV cache compression for long-context tasks without significant performance degradation under constrained memory budgets. Our approach is inspired by the intriguing observation that key states exhibit high similarity at the token level within a single sequence. To facilitate merging, we develop an effective yet straightforward merging set identification algorithm to identify suitable KV states for merging. Our merging set identification algorithm stimulates the second observation that KV cache sparsity, from similarity perspective, is independent of the dataset and remains persistent at the model level. Subsequently, we propose a Gaussian kernel weighted merging algorithm to selectively merge all states within each merging set. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of KVMerger for long-context tasks under constrained memory budgets, applying it to models including Llama2-7B-chat and Llama2-13B-chat. Using the LongBench and ZeroScroll benchmarks, we compare our method with other KV cache compression techniques, including H2O and CaM, showing that our method achieves superior performance across tasks with both 50% and 35% KV cache budgets.
摘要：在大型语言模型的自回归生成过程中，由于其巨大的计算代价，如何有效地为其服务已成为一个紧迫的问题。为了减少计算成本，LLM通常使用KV缓存技术来提高生成速度。在提高计算效率的同时，KV缓存的存储需求非常大，特别是在长上下文场景下，导致了大量的内存消耗。现有的KV缓存逐出方法往往会由于逐出带来的信息丢失而降低LLMS在长上下文场景中的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的KV缓存合并方法，称为KVMerger，用于实现长上下文任务的自适应KV缓存压缩，而不会在内存预算受限的情况下显著降低性能。我们的方法的灵感来自于一个有趣的观察结果，即关键状态在单个序列内的令牌级别显示出高度的相似性。为了便于合并，我们开发了一种有效而简单的合并集合识别算法来识别适合合并的KV状态。我们的合并集合识别算法模拟了第二个观察结果，即从相似性的角度来看，KV缓存稀疏性与数据集无关，并且在模型级别上保持持久。随后，我们提出了一种高斯核加权合并算法来选择性地合并每个合并集中的所有状态。通过对Llama2-7B-Chat和Llama2-13B-Chat等模型的测试，验证了KVMerger在内存预算受限的长上下文任务中的有效性。使用LongBtch和ZeroScroll基准测试，我们将我们的方法与包括H2O和Cam在内的其他KV缓存压缩技术进行了比较，结果表明，我们的方法在50%和35%KV缓存预算的任务中都获得了优越的性能。

[NLP-15] Are Large Language Models Really Bias-Free? Jailbreak Prompts for Assessing Adversarial Robustness to Bias Elicitation
[NLP-15] 大型语言模型真的没有偏见吗？越狱旨在评估偏见煽动的对抗稳健性

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08441
作者: Riccardo Cantini,Giada Cosenza,Alessio Orsino,Domenico Talia
关键词: Large Language Models, Large Language, demonstrating remarkable computational, remarkable computational power, Language Models
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，大型语言，展示了非凡的计算能力，非凡的计算能力，语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized artificial intelligence, demonstrating remarkable computational power and linguistic capabilities. However, these models are inherently prone to various biases stemming from their training data. These include selection, linguistic, and confirmation biases, along with common stereotypes related to gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, religion, socioeconomic status, disability, and age. This study explores the presence of these biases within the responses given by the most recent LLMs, analyzing the impact on their fairness and reliability. We also investigate how known prompt engineering techniques can be exploited to effectively reveal hidden biases of LLMs, testing their adversarial robustness against jailbreak prompts specially crafted for bias elicitation. Extensive experiments are conducted using the most widespread LLMs at different scales, confirming that LLMs can still be manipulated to produce biased or inappropriate responses, despite their advanced capabilities and sophisticated alignment processes. Our findings underscore the importance of enhancing mitigation techniques to address these safety issues, toward a more sustainable and inclusive artificial intelligence.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)给人工智能带来了革命性的变化，展示了卓越的计算能力和语言能力。然而，这些模型的训练数据本身就容易产生各种偏差。这些偏见包括选择、语言和确认偏见，以及与性别、种族、性取向、宗教、社会经济地位、残疾和年龄有关的常见刻板印象。本研究探讨了这些偏向在最新的LLMS的回答中的存在，分析了这些偏向对其公平性和可靠性的影响。我们还研究了如何利用已知的提示工程技术来有效地揭示LLM的隐藏偏见，测试它们对专门为偏见诱导而设计的越狱提示的对抗健壮性。使用最广泛的不同尺度的LLMS进行了广泛的实验，证实LLMS仍然可以被操纵来产生有偏见或不适当的反应，尽管它们具有先进的能力和复杂的比对过程。我们的发现强调了加强缓解技术以解决这些安全问题的重要性，朝着更可持续和更具包容性的人工智能方向发展。

[NLP-16] Beyond Instruction Following: Evaluating Rule Following of Large Language Models
[NLP-16] 超越指令遵循：评估大型语言模型的规则遵循

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08440
作者: Wangtao Sun,Chenxiang Zhang,Xueyou Zhang,Ziyang Huang,Haotian Xu,Pei Chen,Shizhu He,Jun Zhao,Kang Liu
关键词: Large Language Models, Language Models, Large Language, strong instruction-following ability, demonstrated strong instruction-following
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，语言模型，大型语言，较强的描述遵循能力，表现出较强的描述遵循能力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Although Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong instruction-following ability to be helpful, they are further supposed to be controlled and guided by rules in real-world scenarios to be safe, and accurate in responses. This demands the possession of rule-following capability of LLMs. However, few works have made a clear evaluation of the rule-following capability of LLMs. Previous studies that try to evaluate the rule-following capability of LLMs fail to distinguish the rule-following scenarios from the instruction-following scenarios. Therefore, this paper first makes a clarification of the concept of rule-following, and curates a comprehensive benchmark, RuleBench, to evaluate a diversified range of rule-following abilities. Our experimental results on a variety of LLMs show that they are still limited in following rules. Our further analysis provides insights into the improvements for LLMs toward a better rule-following intelligent agent. The data and code can be found at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/llm-rule-following-B3E3/
摘要：虽然大型语言模型(LLM)已经显示出很强的指令跟随能力，但在现实世界的场景中，它们应该受到规则的控制和指导，以确保安全、准确的响应。这就要求低成本管理系统具备遵守规则的能力。然而，很少有文献对LLMS的规则遵循能力做出明确的评价。以往的研究试图评估LLMS的规则遵守能力，但未能区分规则遵守情景和指令遵循情景。因此，本文首先澄清了遵守规则的概念，并编制了一个综合基准RuleBitch来评估各种遵守规则的能力。我们在不同类型的LLM上的实验结果表明，它们仍然局限于遵循规则。我们的进一步分析为LLMS朝着更好的规则遵循智能代理的方向改进提供了见解。数据和代码可在以下网址找到：https://anonymous.4open.science/r/llm-rule-following-B3E3/

[NLP-17] Self-training Language Models for Arithmetic Reasoning
[NLP-17] 用于算术推理的自训练语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08400
作者: Marek Kadlčík,Michal Štefánik
关键词: achieve impressive results, tasks involving complex, involving complex multistep, traditionally requires expensive, requires expensive collection
中文关键词: 取得令人印象深刻的结果，任务涉及复杂，涉及复杂的多步骤，传统上需要昂贵，需要昂贵的收集
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Appeared in ICLR 2024 LLMAgents

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Language models achieve impressive results in tasks involving complex multistep reasoning, but scaling these capabilities further traditionally requires expensive collection of more annotated data. In this work, we explore the potential of improving the capabilities of language models without new data, merely using automated feedback to the validity of their predictions in arithmetic reasoning (self-training). We find that models can substantially improve in both single-round (offline) and online self-training. In the offline setting, supervised methods are able to deliver gains comparable to preference optimization, but in online self-training, preference optimization shows to largely outperform supervised training thanks to superior stability and robustness on unseen types of problems.
摘要：语言模型在涉及复杂多步推理的任务中取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但进一步扩展这些能力传统上需要昂贵地收集更多注释数据。在这项工作中，我们探索了在没有新数据的情况下提高语言模型能力的潜力，仅使用对其在算术推理（自我训练）中预测有效性的自动反馈。我们发现，模型在单轮（线下）和在线自我训练中都可以大幅提高。在离线环境中，监督方法能够提供与偏好优化相当的收益，但在在线自我训练中，偏好优化显示在很大程度上优于监督训练，这要归功于对不可见类型的问题具有卓越的稳定性和鲁棒性。

[NLP-18] On the attribution of confidence to large language models
[NLP-18] 关于信心对大型语言模型的归因

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08388
作者: Geoff Keeling,Winnie Street
关键词: Large Language Models, LLM credence attributions, LLM credence, LLM, Language Models
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，LLM信任属性，LLM信任，LLM，语言模型
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 22 pages, 0 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Credences are mental states corresponding to degrees of confidence in propositions. Attribution of credences to Large Language Models (LLMs) is commonplace in the empirical literature on LLM evaluation. Yet the theoretical basis for LLM credence attribution is unclear. We defend three claims. First, our semantic claim is that LLM credence attributions are (at least in general) correctly interpreted literally, as expressing truth-apt beliefs on the part of scientists that purport to describe facts about LLM credences. Second, our metaphysical claim is that the existence of LLM credences is at least plausible, although current evidence is inconclusive. Third, our epistemic claim is that LLM credence attributions made in the empirical literature on LLM evaluation are subject to non-trivial sceptical concerns. It is a distinct possibility that even if LLMs have credences, LLM credence attributions are generally false because the experimental techniques used to assess LLM credences are not truth-tracking.
摘要：证书是与人们对命题的信心程度相对应的心理状态。在大型语言模型评估的经验文献中，将证书归因于大型语言模型(LLM)是很常见的。然而，LLM证据归属的理论基础尚不清楚。我们为三项指控辩护。首先，我们的语义主张是，LLM凭证属性(至少在一般情况下)被正确地从字面上解释为表达了科学家部分的接近真理的信念，声称描述了关于LLM凭证的事实。其次，我们的形而上学主张是，LLM证书的存在至少是可信的，尽管目前的证据并不确凿。第三，我们的认知主张是，在LLM评估的经验文献中所做的LLM信任性归因受到不平凡的怀疑的关注。一种明显的可能性是，即使LLM拥有证书，LLM证书归因通常也是错误的，因为用于评估LLM证书的实验技术不是真理跟踪。

[NLP-19] AutoBencher: Creating Salient Novel Difficult Datasets for Language Models
[NLP-19] AutoBencher：为语言模型创建突出的新颖困难数据集

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08351
作者: Xiang Lisa Li,Evan Zheran Liu,Percy Liang,Tatsunori Hashimoto
关键词: tracking scientific progress, Evaluation is critical, informing model selection, assessing capabilities, tracking scientific
中文关键词: 跟踪科学进展，评估至关重要，为模型选择提供信息，评估能力，跟踪科学
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: preprint

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Evaluation is critical for assessing capabilities, tracking scientific progress, and informing model selection. In this paper, we present three desiderata for a good benchmark for language models: (i) salience (e.g., knowledge about World War II is more salient than a random day in history), (ii) novelty (i.e., the benchmark reveals new trends in model rankings not shown by previous benchmarks), and (iii) difficulty (i.e., the benchmark should be difficult for existing models, leaving headroom for future improvement). We operationalize these three desiderata and cast benchmark creation as a search problem, that of finding benchmarks that that satisfy all three desiderata. To tackle this search problem, we present AutoBencher, which uses a language model to automatically search for datasets that meet the three desiderata. AutoBencher uses privileged information (e.g. relevant documents) to construct reliable datasets, and adaptivity with reranking to optimize for the search objective. We use AutoBencher to create datasets for math, multilingual, and knowledge-intensive question answering. The scalability of AutoBencher allows it to test fine-grained categories and tail knowledge, creating datasets that are on average 27% more novel and 22% more difficult than existing benchmarks. A closer investigation of our constructed datasets shows that we can identify specific gaps in LM knowledge in language models that are not captured by existing benchmarks, such as Gemini Pro performing much worse on question answering about the Permian Extinction and Fordism, while OpenAGI-7B performing surprisingly well on QA about COVID-19.
摘要：评估是评估能力、跟踪科学进展和指导模型选择的关键。在本文中，我们为语言模型提出了三个好的基准：(I)显著(例如，关于第二次世界大战的知识比历史上的随机一天更突出)，(Ii)新颖性(即基准揭示了以前基准没有显示的模型排名的新趋势)，以及(Iii)难度(即基准对于现有模型来说应该是困难的，为未来的改进留出了余地)。我们将这三个愿望数据付诸实施，并将基准创建作为一个搜索问题，即找到满足所有三个愿望数据的基准。为了解决这个搜索问题，我们提出了AutoBencher，它使用一个语言模型来自动搜索满足这三个期望的数据集。AutoBencher使用特权信息(例如相关文档)构建可靠的数据集，并使用重新排序的适应性来优化搜索目标。我们使用AutoBencher为数学、多语言和知识密集型问题回答创建数据集。AutoBencher的可扩展性使其能够测试细粒度的类别和尾部知识，创建的数据集比现有基准平均多27%的新颖性和22%的难度。对我们构建的数据集的更仔细的研究表明，我们可以在现有基准程序未捕获的语言模型中发现LM知识中的特定差距，例如Gemini Pro在有关二叠纪灭绝和福特主义的问题回答上表现糟糕得多，而OpenAGI-7B在有关新冠肺炎的QA上表现得出人意料地好。

[NLP-20] Skywork-Math: Data Scaling Laws for Mathematical Reasoning in Large Language Models – The Story Goes On
[NLP-20] Skywork-Math：大型语言模型中数学推理的数据缩放定律–故事继续

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08348
作者: Liang Zeng,Liangjun Zhong,Liang Zhao,Tianwen Wei,Liu Yang,Jujie He,Cheng Cheng,Rui Hu,Yang Liu,Shuicheng Yan,Han Fang,Yahui Zhou
关键词: mathematical reasoning capabilities, large language models, math reasoning capabilities, reasoning capabilities, investigate the underlying
中文关键词: 数学推理能力，大型语言模型，数学推理能力，推理能力，调查底层
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this paper, we investigate the underlying factors that potentially enhance the mathematical reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). We argue that the data scaling law for math reasoning capabilities in modern LLMs is far from being saturated, highlighting how the model’s quality improves with increases in data quantity. To support this claim, we introduce the Skywork-Math model series, supervised fine-tuned (SFT) on common 7B LLMs using our proposed 2.5M-instance Skywork-MathQA dataset. Skywork-Math 7B has achieved impressive accuracies of 51.2% on the competition-level MATH benchmark and 83.9% on the GSM8K benchmark using only SFT data, outperforming an early version of GPT-4 on MATH. The superior performance of Skywork-Math models contributes to our novel two-stage data synthesis and model SFT pipelines, which include three different augmentation methods and a diverse seed problem set, ensuring both the quantity and quality of Skywork-MathQA dataset across varying difficulty levels. Most importantly, we provide several practical takeaways to enhance math reasoning abilities in LLMs for both research and industry applications.
摘要：在这篇文章中，我们调查了可能提高大型语言模型(LLM)数学推理能力的潜在因素。我们认为，现代LLMS中数学推理能力的数据比例法则远未饱和，强调了模型质量是如何随着数据量的增加而提高的。为了支持这一说法，我们引入了Skywork-MathQA模型系列，使用我们建议的250万实例Skywork-MathQA数据集在常见的7B LLM上进行了监督微调(SFT)。仅使用SFT数据，SkyWork-Math 7B在竞赛级别的数学基准上的准确率达到了令人印象深刻的51.2%，在GSM8K基准上达到了83.9%，在数学上超过了早期版本的GPT-4。Skywork-MathQA模型的卓越性能有助于我们新颖的两阶段数据合成和模型SFT管道，其中包括三种不同的扩充方法和不同的种子问题集，确保不同难度级别的Skywork-MathQA数据集的数量和质量。最重要的是，我们提供了几个实用的方法来增强LLMS的数学推理能力，用于研究和工业应用。

[NLP-21] owards Explainable Evolution Strategies with Large Language Models
[NLP-21] owards使用大型语言模型的可解释进化策略

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08331
作者: Jill Baumann,Oliver Kramer
关键词: Large Language Models, self-adaptive Evolution Strategies, Language Models, Large Language, integrates self-adaptive Evolution
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，自适应进化策略，语言模型，大型语言，集成自适应进化
类目: Neural and Evolutionary Computing (cs.NE); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted at ESANN 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper introduces an approach that integrates self-adaptive Evolution Strategies (ES) with Large Language Models (LLMs) to enhance the explainability of complex optimization processes. By employing a self-adaptive ES equipped with a restart mechanism, we effectively navigate the challenging landscapes of benchmark functions, capturing detailed logs of the optimization journey, including fitness evolution, step-size adjustments, and restart events due to stagnation. An LLM is then utilized to process these logs, generating concise, user-friendly summaries that highlight key aspects such as convergence behavior, optimal fitness achievements, and encounters with local optima. Our case study on the Rastrigin function demonstrates how our approach makes the complexities of ES optimization transparent and accessible. Our findings highlight the potential of using LLMs to bridge the gap between advanced optimization algorithms and their interpretability.
摘要：本文介绍了一种将自适应进化策略（ES）与大型语言模型（LLM）集成的方法，以增强复杂优化过程的可解释性。通过采用配备重启机制的自适应ES，我们有效地应对基准功能的挑战，捕获优化旅程的详细日志，包括适应度进化、步数调整和停滞导致的重启事件。然后利用LLM来处理这些日志，生成简洁、用户友好的摘要，其中突出显示收敛行为、最佳适应性成就以及遇到局部最佳情况等关键方面。我们对Rastrigin函数的案例研究展示了我们的方法如何使ES优化的复杂性透明且易于访问。我们的研究结果强调了使用LLM弥合高级优化算法及其可解释性之间差距的潜力。

[NLP-22] RB-SQL: A Retrieval-based LLM Framework for Text-to-SQL
[NLP-22] RB-SQL：一个基于检索的文本到SQL的LLM框架

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08273
作者: Zhenhe Wu,Zhongqiu Li,Jie Zhang,Mengxiang Li,Yu Zhao,Ruiyu Fang,Zhongjiang He,Xuelong Li,Zhoujun Li,Shuangyong Song
关键词: Large language models, significantly improved, Large language, SQL generation prompt, exclusive SQL generation
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，显着改进，大型语言，SQL生成提示，独家SQL生成
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models (LLMs) with in-context learning have significantly improved the performance of text-to-SQL task. Previous works generally focus on using exclusive SQL generation prompt to improve the LLMs’ reasoning ability. However, they are mostly hard to handle large databases with numerous tables and columns, and usually ignore the significance of pre-processing database and extracting valuable information for more efficient prompt engineering. Based on above analysis, we propose RB-SQL, a novel retrieval-based LLM framework for in-context prompt engineering, which consists of three modules that retrieve concise tables and columns as schema, and targeted examples for in-context learning. Experiment results demonstrate that our model achieves better performance than several competitive baselines on public datasets BIRD and Spider.
摘要：具有上下文学习的大型语言模型（LLM）显着提高了文本到SQL任务的性能。以往的作品通常集中在使用独占的SQL生成提示来提高LLM的推理能力。然而，它们大多难以处理具有众多表和列的大型数据库，并且通常忽视了预处理数据库和提取有价值信息以实现更高效的即时工程的重要性。基于上述分析，我们提出了RB-SQL，这是一种新颖的基于检索的LLM框架，用于上下文提示工程，它由三个模块组成，检索简洁的表和列作为模式，以及用于上下文学习的有针对性的示例。实验结果表明，我们的模型比公共数据集BIRD和Spider上的几个竞争基线获得了更好的性能。

[NLP-23] LLMs morphological analyses of complex FST-generated Finnish words
[NLP-23] LLM对FST生成的复杂芬兰词进行形态分析

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08269
作者: Anssi Moisio,Mathias Creutz,Mikko Kurimo
关键词: Rule-based language processing, neural NLP systems, language processing systems, Rule-based language, neural NLP
中文关键词: 基于规则的语言处理，神经NLP系统，语言处理系统，基于规则的语言，神经NLP
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: To appear at the CMCL Workshop at ACL 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Rule-based language processing systems have been overshadowed by neural systems in terms of utility, but it remains unclear whether neural NLP systems, in practice, learn the grammar rules that humans use. This work aims to shed light on the issue by evaluating state-of-the-art LLMs in a task of morphological analysis of complex Finnish noun forms. We generate the forms using an FST tool, and they are unlikely to have occurred in the training sets of the LLMs, therefore requiring morphological generalisation capacity. We find that GPT-4-turbo has some difficulties in the task while GPT-3.5-turbo struggles and smaller models Llama2-70B and Poro-34B fail nearly completely.
摘要：基于规则的语言处理系统在实用性方面已经被神经系统所掩盖，但目前尚不清楚神经NLP系统在实践中是否会学习人类使用的语法规则。这项工作旨在通过评估最先进的法学硕士来阐明这个问题，以对复杂的芬兰名词形式进行形态分析。我们使用FST工具生成表格，它们不太可能出现在LLM的训练集中，因此需要形态概括能力。我们发现GPT-4-涡轮增压器在任务中遇到了一些困难，而GPT-3.5-涡轮增压器则遇到困难，较小型号Llama 2 - 70 B和Poro-34 B几乎完全失败。

[NLP-24] Speculative RAG: Enhancing Retrieval Augmented Generation through Drafting
[NLP-24] 推测性RAG：通过起草增强检索增强生成

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08223
作者: Zilong Wang,Zifeng Wang,Long Le,Huaixiu Steven Zheng,Swaroop Mishra,Vincent Perot,Yuwei Zhang,Anush Mattapalli,Ankur Taly,Jingbo Shang,Chen-Yu Lee,Tomas Pfister
关键词: large language models, Retrieval augmented generation, external knowledge sources, augmented generation, combines the generative
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、检索增强生成、外部知识源、增强生成、结合生成
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Preprint

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Retrieval augmented generation (RAG) combines the generative abilities of large language models (LLMs) with external knowledge sources to provide more accurate and up-to-date responses. Recent RAG advancements focus on improving retrieval outcomes through iterative LLM refinement or self-critique capabilities acquired through additional instruction tuning of LLMs. In this work, we introduce Speculative RAG - a framework that leverages a larger generalist LM to efficiently verify multiple RAG drafts produced in parallel by a smaller, distilled specialist LM. Each draft is generated from a distinct subset of retrieved documents, offering diverse perspectives on the evidence while reducing input token counts per draft. This approach enhances comprehension of each subset and mitigates potential position bias over long context. Our method accelerates RAG by delegating drafting to the smaller specialist LM, with the larger generalist LM performing a single verification pass over the drafts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Speculative RAG achieves state-of-the-art performance with reduced latency on TriviaQA, MuSiQue, PubHealth, and ARC-Challenge benchmarks. It notably enhances accuracy by up to 12.97% while reducing latency by 51% compared to conventional RAG systems on PubHealth.
摘要：检索增强生成(RAG)结合了大型语言模型(LLM)的生成能力和外部知识源，以提供更准确和最新的响应。最近RAG的进展集中于通过迭代LLM精化或通过LLM的额外指令调优获得的自我批评能力来改善检索结果。在这项工作中，我们引入了投机性RAG-一个框架，它利用一个更大的通才LM来有效地验证由较小的精馏专家LM并行产生的多个RAG草稿。每个草稿都是从检索到的文件的不同子集生成的，提供了关于证据的不同视角，同时减少了每个草稿的输入令牌计数。这种方法增强了对每个子集的理解，并减轻了对长上下文的潜在位置偏差。我们的方法通过将起草委托给较小的专家LM来加速RAG，而较大的通才LM对草稿执行一次验证。大量实验表明，投机性RAG在TriviaQA、Musique、PubHealth和ARC-Challenger基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，并减少了延迟。与PubHealth上的传统RAG系统相比，它显著提高了12.97%的准确率，同时减少了51%的延迟。

[NLP-25] Generating Contextually-Relevant Navigation Instructions for Blind and Low Vision People
[NLP-25] 为盲人和低视力者生成上下文相关的导航指令

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08219
作者: Zain Merchant,Abrar Anwar,Emily Wang,Souti Chattopadhyay,Jesse Thomason
关键词: unfamiliar environments presents, environments presents significant, presents significant challenges, Navigating unfamiliar environments, blind and low-vision
中文关键词: 存在不熟悉的环境，环境存在重大，存在重大挑战，导航不熟悉的环境，盲人和低视力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Human-Computer Interaction (cs.HC)
备注: Accepted as RO-MAN 2024 Late Breaking Report

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Navigating unfamiliar environments presents significant challenges for blind and low-vision (BLV) individuals. In this work, we construct a dataset of images and goals across different scenarios such as searching through kitchens or navigating outdoors. We then investigate how grounded instruction generation methods can provide contextually-relevant navigational guidance to users in these instances. Through a sighted user study, we demonstrate that large pretrained language models can produce correct and useful instructions perceived as beneficial for BLV users. We also conduct a survey and interview with 4 BLV users and observe useful insights on preferences for different instructions based on the scenario.
摘要：在陌生的环境中航行对盲人和低视力（BLV）个人来说带来了重大挑战。在这项工作中，我们构建了一个跨越不同场景（例如搜索厨房或在户外导航）的图像和目标数据集。然后，我们研究扎根指令生成方法如何在这些情况下为用户提供上下文相关的导航指导。通过一项有远见的用户研究，我们证明大型预训练语言模型可以生成正确且有用的指令，这些指令被认为对BLV用户有利。我们还对4名BLV用户进行了调查和采访，并根据场景观察有关不同指令偏好的有用见解。

[NLP-26] System Report for CCL24-Eval Task 7: Multi-Error Modeling and Fluency-Targeted Pre-training for Chinese Essay Evaluation
[NLP-26] CCL 24的系统报告-Eval任务7：中文论文评估的多错误建模和针对流畅性的预训练

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08206
作者: Jingshen Zhang,Xiangyu Yang,Xinkai Su,Xinglu Chen,Tianyou Huang,Xinying Qiu
关键词: Chinese Essay Fluency, Essay Fluency Evaluation, system report presents, Chinese Essay, Fluency Evaluation
中文关键词: 中文论文流利度，论文流利度评估，系统报告呈现，中文论文，流利度评估
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This system report presents our approaches and results for the Chinese Essay Fluency Evaluation (CEFE) task at CCL-2024. For Track 1, we optimized predictions for challenging fine-grained error types using binary classification models and trained coarse-grained models on the Chinese Learner 4W corpus. In Track 2, we enhanced performance by constructing a pseudo-dataset with multiple error types per sentence. For Track 3, where we achieved first place, we generated fluency-rated pseudo-data via back-translation for pre-training and used an NSP-based strategy with Symmetric Cross Entropy loss to capture context and mitigate long dependencies. Our methods effectively address key challenges in Chinese Essay Fluency Evaluation.
摘要：本系统报告介绍了我们在CCL-2024上进行中文论文流利度评估（CEFE）任务的方法和结果。对于Track 1，我们使用二元分类模型和在中国Learner 4 W数据库上训练的粗粒度模型优化了具有挑战性的细粒度错误类型的预测。在Track 2中，我们通过构建每个句子具有多个错误类型的伪数据集来增强性能。对于我们获得第一名的第3轨，我们通过预训练的反向翻译生成流畅度评级的伪数据，并使用基于NSP的具有对称交叉熵损失的策略来捕获上下文并减轻长期依赖性。我们的方法有效地解决了中文论文流利度评估中的关键挑战。

[NLP-27] A Text-to-Game Engine for UGC-Based Role-Playing Games
[NLP-27] 基于UGC的角色扮演游戏的文本到游戏引擎

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08195
作者: Lei Zhang,Xuezheng Peng,Shuyi Yang,Feiyang Wang
关键词: professionally generated content, generated content, user-generated content, text to video, professionally generated
中文关键词: 专业生成的内容、生成的内容、用户生成的内容、文本到视频、专业生成的
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Multiagent Systems (cs.MA)
备注: 13 pages,11 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The shift from professionally generated content (PGC) to user-generated content (UGC) has revolutionized various media formats, from text to video. With the rapid advancements in generative AI, a similar shift is set to transform the game industry, particularly in the realm of role-playing games (RPGs). This paper introduces a new framework for a text-to-game engine that utilizes foundation models to convert simple textual inputs into complex, interactive RPG experiences. The engine dynamically renders the game story in a multi-modal format and adjusts the game character, environment, and mechanics in real-time in response to player actions. Using this framework, we developed the “Zagii” game engine, which has successfully supported hundreds of RPG games across a diverse range of genres and facilitated tens of thousands of online user gameplay instances. This validates the effectiveness of our frame-work. Our work showcases the potential for a more open and democratized gaming paradigm, highlighting the transformative impact of generative AI on the game life cycle.
摘要：从专业生成内容(PGC)到用户生成内容(UGC)的转变彻底改变了从文本到视频的各种媒体格式。随着生成性人工智能的快速发展，类似的转变也将改变游戏行业，特别是在角色扮演游戏(RPG)领域。本文介绍了一个新的文本到游戏引擎的框架，它利用基础模型将简单的文本输入转换为复杂的、交互式的RPG体验。该引擎以多模式格式动态地呈现游戏故事，并响应玩家的动作实时调整游戏角色、环境和机制。这验证了我们框架的有效性。我们的工作展示了一个更开放和民主化的游戏范式的潜力，突出了生成性人工智能对游戏生命周期的变革性影响。

[NLP-28] fairBERTs: Erasing Sensitive Information Through Semantic and Fairness-aware Perturbations
[NLP-28] fairBERT：通过语义和公平意识的扰动擦除敏感信息

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08189
作者: Jinfeng Li,Yuefeng Chen,Xiangyu Liu,Longtao Huang,Rong Zhang,Hui Xue
关键词: Pre-trained language models, natural language processing, Pre-trained language, language processing research, natural language
中文关键词: 预训练语言模型、自然语言处理、预训练语言、语言处理研究、自然语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Pre-trained language models (PLMs) have revolutionized both the natural language processing research and applications. However, stereotypical biases (e.g., gender and racial discrimination) encoded in PLMs have raised negative ethical implications for PLMs, which critically limits their broader applications. To address the aforementioned unfairness issues, we present fairBERTs, a general framework for learning fair fine-tuned BERT series models by erasing the protected sensitive information via semantic and fairness-aware perturbations generated by a generative adversarial network. Through extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments on two real-world tasks, we demonstrate the great superiority of fairBERTs in mitigating unfairness while maintaining the model utility. We also verify the feasibility of transferring adversarial components in fairBERTs to other conventionally trained BERT-like models for yielding fairness improvements. Our findings may shed light on further research on building fairer fine-tuned PLMs.
摘要：预训练语言模型给自然语言处理的研究和应用带来了革命性的变化。然而，PLM中编码的陈规定型偏见(如性别和种族歧视)对PLM产生了负面的伦理影响，这严重限制了其更广泛的应用。为了解决上述不公平问题，我们提出了FIRBERTS，这是一个学习公平微调的BERT系列模型的通用框架，它通过生成性对抗网络产生的语义和公平感知扰动来擦除受保护的敏感信息。通过在两个真实任务上的大量定性和定量实验，我们证明了公平BERTS在保持模型效用的同时，在缓解不公平性方面的巨大优势。我们还验证了将公平BERT中的对抗性部分转移到其他常规训练的类BERT模型以产生公平性改善的可行性。我们的发现可能会对构建更公平微调的PLM的进一步研究有所帮助。

[NLP-29] Automatic Generation of Web Censorship Probe Lists
[NLP-29] 自动生成网络审查调查列表

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08185
作者: Jenny Tang,Leo Alvarez,Arjun Brar,Nguyen Phong Hoang,Nicolas Christin
关键词: Domain probe lists, Domain probe, probe lists, censorship measurement studies, Web censorship
中文关键词: 领域调查列表、领域调查、调查列表、审查测量研究、网络审查
类目: Cryptography and Security (cs.CR); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computers and Society (cs.CY); Networking and Internet Architecture (cs.NI)
备注: To appear in the Proceedings on Privacy Enhancing Technologies 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Domain probe lists–used to determine which URLs to probe for Web censorship–play a critical role in Internet censorship measurement studies. Indeed, the size and accuracy of the domain probe list limits the set of censored pages that can be detected; inaccurate lists can lead to an incomplete view of the censorship landscape or biased results. Previous efforts to generate domain probe lists have been mostly manual or crowdsourced. This approach is time-consuming, prone to errors, and does not scale well to the ever-changing censorship landscape. In this paper, we explore methods for automatically generating probe lists that are both comprehensive and up-to-date for Web censorship measurement. We start from an initial set of 139,957 unique URLs from various existing test lists consisting of pages from a variety of languages to generate new candidate pages. By analyzing content from these URLs (i.e., performing topic and keyword extraction), expanding these topics, and using them as a feed to search engines, our method produces 119,255 new URLs across 35,147 domains. We then test the new candidate pages by attempting to access each URL from servers in eleven different global locations over a span of four months to check for their connectivity and potential signs of censorship. Our measurements reveal that our method discovered over 1,400 domains–not present in the original dataset–we suspect to be blocked. In short, automatically updating probe lists is possible, and can help further automate censorship measurements at scale. Comments: To appear in the Proceedings on Privacy Enhancing Technologies 2024 Subjects: Cryptography and Security (cs.CR); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computers and Society (cs.CY); Networking and Internet Architecture (cs.NI) Cite as: arXiv:2407.08185 [cs.CR] (or arXiv:2407.08185v1 [cs.CR] for this version) Related DOI: https://doi.org/10.56553/popets-2024-0106 Focus to learn more DOI(s) linking to related resources
摘要：域探测列表–用于确定要探测哪些URL以进行网络审查–在互联网审查测量研究中起着关键作用。事实上，域探测列表的大小和准确性限制了可以检测到的被审查页面集；不准确的列表可能导致对审查情况的不完整看法或有偏见的结果。以前生成域探测列表的工作大多是手动或众包的。这种方法很耗时，容易出错，而且不能很好地适应不断变化的审查格局。在这篇文章中，我们探索了自动生成探测列表的方法，该列表既全面又最新，用于网络审查测量。我们从来自各种现有测试列表的139,957个唯一URL的初始集合开始，这些列表由来自各种语言的页面组成，以生成新的候选页面。通过分析这些URL的内容(即执行主题和关键字提取)，扩展这些主题，并将它们用作搜索引擎的提要，我们的方法在35,147个域中生成119,255个新URL。然后，我们在四个月的时间里，通过尝试从11个不同全球地点的服务器访问每个URL来测试新的候选页面，以检查它们的连接性和潜在的审查迹象。我们的测量显示，我们的方法发现了1400多个域–原始数据集中没有出现–我们怀疑这些域被阻止了。简而言之，自动更新探测列表是可能的，并有助于进一步实现大规模审查测量的自动化。评论：发表在《2024年隐私增强技术论文集》：密码学与安全(cs.CR)；计算与语言(cs.CL)；计算机与社会(cs.CY)；网络和互联网架构(cs.NI)引用AS：arxiv：2407.08185cs.CR相关DOI：https://doi.org/10.56553/popets-2024-0106 Focus了解更多指向相关资源的DOI(S)链接

[NLP-30] Beyond Text: Leveraging Multi-Task Learning and Cognitive Appraisal Theory for Post-Purchase Intention Analysis
[NLP-30] 超越文本：利用多任务学习和认知评价理论进行购买后意图分析

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08182
作者: Gerard Christopher Yeo,Shaz Furniturewala,Kokil Jaidka
关键词: Supervised machine-learning models, challenging classification problem, Supervised machine-learning, text classification tasks, Cognitive Appraisal Theory
中文关键词: 受监督的机器学习模型、具有挑战性的分类问题、受监督的机器学习、文本分类任务、认知评价理论
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Supervised machine-learning models for predicting user behavior offer a challenging classification problem with lower average prediction performance scores than other text classification tasks. This study evaluates multi-task learning frameworks grounded in Cognitive Appraisal Theory to predict user behavior as a function of users’ self-expression and psychological attributes. Our experiments show that users’ language and traits improve predictions above and beyond models predicting only from text. Our findings highlight the importance of integrating psychological constructs into NLP to enhance the understanding and prediction of user actions. We close with a discussion of the implications for future applications of large language models for computational psychology.
摘要：用于预测用户行为的有监督的机器学习模型提供了一个具有挑战性的分类问题，其平均预测性能分数低于其他文本分类任务。这项研究评估了基于认知评价理论的多任务学习框架，以根据用户的自我表达和心理属性来预测用户行为。我们的实验表明，用户的语言和特征可以改善预测，超越仅根据文本进行预测的模型。我们的研究结果强调了将心理学结构整合到NLP中以增强对用户行为的理解和预测的重要性。最后，我们讨论大型语言模型对计算心理学未来应用的影响。

[NLP-31] Privacy-Preserving Data Deduplication for Enhancing Federated Learning of Language Models
[NLP-31] 用于增强语言模型联邦学习的隐私保护数据库

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08152
作者: Aydin Abadi,Vishnu Asutosh Dasu,Sumanta Sarkar
关键词: vital preprocessing step, enhances machine learning, saves training time, vital preprocessing, preprocessing step
中文关键词: 重要的预处理步骤，增强机器学习，节省训练时间，重要的预处理，预处理步骤
类目: Cryptography and Security (cs.CR); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Deduplication is a vital preprocessing step that enhances machine learning model performance and saves training time and energy. However, enhancing federated learning through deduplication poses challenges, especially regarding scalability and potential privacy violations if deduplication involves sharing all clients’ data. In this paper, we address the problem of deduplication in a federated setup by introducing a pioneering protocol, Efficient Privacy-Preserving Multi-Party Deduplication (EP-MPD). It efficiently removes duplicates from multiple clients’ datasets without compromising data privacy. EP-MPD is constructed in a modular fashion, utilizing two novel variants of the Private Set Intersection protocol. Our extensive experiments demonstrate the significant benefits of deduplication in federated learning of large language models. For instance, we observe up to 19.61% improvement in perplexity and up to 27.95% reduction in running time. EP-MPD effectively balances privacy and performance in federated learning, making it a valuable solution for large-scale applications.
摘要：重复数据删除是提高机器学习模型性能、节省训练时间和精力的重要预处理步骤。然而，通过重复数据删除来增强联合学习会带来挑战，特别是在可扩展性方面，如果重复数据删除涉及共享所有客户端的数据，则可能会侵犯隐私。在本文中，我们通过引入一种开创性的协议–高效隐私保护多方重复数据删除协议(EP-MPD)来解决联合系统中的重复数据删除问题。它高效地从多个客户端的数据集中删除重复项，而不会损害数据隐私。EP-MPD以模块化的方式构建，利用了私有集相交协议的两个新变体。我们的广泛实验证明了重复数据删除在大型语言模型的联合学习中的显著好处。例如，我们观察到困惑程度改善了19.61%，运行时间减少了27.95%。EP-MPD有效地平衡了联合学习中的隐私和性能，使其成为大规模应用程序的宝贵解决方案。

[NLP-32] Looks can be Deceptive: Distinguishing Repetition Disfluency from Reduplication
[NLP-32] 外表可能具有欺骗性：区分重复不流利与重复

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08147
作者: Arif Ahmad,Mothika Gayathri Khyathi,Pushpak Bhattacharyya
关键词: serve distinct linguistic, distinct linguistic purposes, similar in form, serve distinct, Reduplication and repetition
中文关键词: 服务于不同的语言，不同的语言目的，形式相似，服务于不同的，重叠和重复
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Reduplication and repetition, though similar in form, serve distinct linguistic purposes. Reduplication is a deliberate morphological process used to express grammatical, semantic, or pragmatic nuances, while repetition is often unintentional and indicative of disfluency. This paper presents the first large-scale study of reduplication and repetition in speech using computational linguistics. We introduce IndicRedRep, a new publicly available dataset containing Hindi, Telugu, and Marathi text annotated with reduplication and repetition at the word level. We evaluate transformer-based models for multi-class reduplication and repetition token classification, utilizing the Reparandum-Interregnum-Repair structure to distinguish between the two phenomena. Our models achieve macro F1 scores of up to 85.62% in Hindi, 83.95% in Telugu, and 84.82% in Marathi for reduplication-repetition classification.
摘要：重叠和重复虽然形式相似，但服务于不同的语言目的。重叠是一种故意的形态过程，用于表达语法、语义或务实的细微差别，而重复通常是无意的，并表明不流利。本文首次使用计算语言学对言语中的重叠和重复进行大规模研究。我们引入IndicRedRep，这是一个新的公开可用数据集，包含印地语、泰卢固语和马拉地语文本，并在单词级别上使用重叠和重复进行注释。我们利用Reparandum-Interregnum-Repair结构来区分这两种现象，评估基于转换器的多类重复和重复标记分类的模型。对于重复重复分类，我们的模型在印地语中的宏F1评分高达85.62%，在泰卢固语中为83.95%，在马拉地语中为84.82%。

[NLP-33] How Well Can a Long Sequence Model Model Long Sequences? Comparing Architechtural Inductive Biases on Long-Context Abilities
[NLP-33] 长序列模型对长序列的建模效果如何？比较建筑归纳偏见对长上下文能力的影响

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08112
作者: Jerry Huang
关键词: numerous down-stream use-cases, Long sequences occur, opens numerous down-stream, Long sequences, real-world scenarios
中文关键词: 许多下游用例，长序列发生，打开许多下游，长序列，现实世界场景
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Work In Progress. 9 pages

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Long sequences occur in abundance within real-world scenarios, hence properly modelling them opens numerous down-stream use-cases. Deep neural networks, however, have often struggled with these for a variety of reasons. Recent advances, both in system engineering as well as model design, have enabled the scaling up of model that are purported to support extended context length. In particular, the state-space and linear recurrent neural network families of models hypothetically can entend to infinite sequence lenth. However, is this too good to be true? We conduct an evaluation to show that while such claims may be sound theoretically, there remain large practical gaps that are empirically observed. In particular, recurrent models still suffer in the same settings as long-context LLMs with attention. We further show that different inductive biases have inconsistent extrapolation capabilities, highlighting the need to further study such paradigms and investigate why long-context models seemingly fail to behave as one might expect.
摘要：长序列在真实场景中大量出现，因此正确地对它们建模可以打开大量的下游用例。然而，由于各种原因，深度神经网络经常在这些问题上举步维艰。最近在系统工程和模型设计方面的进展使据称支持扩展上下文长度的模型得以放大。特别地，状态空间和线性递归神经网络族模型假设可以延伸到无穷序列长度。然而，这是不是太好了，不像是真的？我们进行了一项评估，以表明尽管这种说法在理论上可能是合理的，但在经验上仍存在巨大的实际差距。具体地说，循环模型在相同的环境中仍然受到关注的长背景LLM的影响。我们进一步表明，不同的归纳偏差具有不一致的外推能力，强调了进一步研究此类范式的必要性，并调查为什么长语境模型似乎没有表现出人们可能预期的行为。

[NLP-34] Automata-based constraints for language model decoding
[NLP-34] 基于自动机的语言模型解码约束

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08103
作者: Terry Koo,Frederick Liu,Luheng He
关键词: structured data, code snippets, expected to generate, generate strings, API calls
中文关键词: 结构化数据、代码片段、预期生成、生成字符串、API调用
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Formal Languages and Automata Theory (cs.FL)
备注: Accepted to CoLM 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:LMs are often expected to generate strings in some formal language; for example, structured data, API calls, or code snippets. Although LMs can be tuned to improve their adherence to formal syntax, this does not guarantee conformance, especially with smaller LMs suitable for large-scale deployment. In addition, tuning requires significant resources, making it impractical for uncommon or task-specific formats. To prevent downstream parsing errors we would ideally constrain the LM to only produce valid output, but this is severely complicated by tokenization, which is typically both ambiguous and misaligned with the formal grammar. We solve these issues through the application of automata theory, deriving an efficient closed-form solution for the regular languages, a broad class of formal languages with many practical applications, including API calls or schema-guided JSON and YAML. We also discuss pragmatic extensions for coping with the issue of high branching factor. Finally, we extend our techniques to deterministic context-free languages, which similarly admit an efficient closed-form solution. In spite of its flexibility and representative power, our approach only requires access to per-token decoding logits and lowers into simple calculations that are independent of LM size, making it both efficient and easy to apply to almost any LM architecture.
摘要：人们通常希望LP以某种形式的语言生成字符串；例如，结构化数据、API调用或代码片段。尽管可以对LMS进行调整以改进其对形式语法的遵守，但这并不能保证一致性，特别是对于适合大规模部署的较小的LMS。此外，调优需要大量资源，这使得它对于不常见或特定于任务的格式是不切实际的。为了防止下游解析错误，理想情况下，我们会将LM约束为仅生成有效输出，但这会因为标记化而变得非常复杂，标记化通常是模棱两可的，并且与形式语法不一致。我们通过应用自动机理论来解决这些问题，为正规语言推导出一个有效的封闭解，正规语言是一大类具有许多实际应用的形式语言，包括API调用或模式制导的JSON和YAML。我们还讨论了处理高分支因子问题的语用扩展。最后，我们将我们的技术扩展到确定性上下文无关语言，这些语言同样允许有一个有效的闭合形式的解。尽管我们的方法具有灵活性和代表性的能力，但它只需要访问每个令牌的解码日志，并且简化为独立于LM大小的简单计算，使得它既高效又易于应用于几乎任何LM体系结构。

[NLP-35] How does Burrows Delta work on medieval Chinese poetic texts?
[NLP-35] Burrows Delta如何处理中世纪中国诗歌文本？

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08099
作者: Boris Orekhov
关键词: Burrows’ Delta, effective tool, Delta, Delta method, Burrows’
中文关键词: 伯罗斯’ Delta，有效工具，Delta，Delta方法，伯罗斯’
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 2 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Burrows’ Delta was introduced in 2002 and has proven to be an effective tool for author attribution. Despite the fact that these are different languages, they mostly belong to the same grammatical type and use the same graphic principle to convey speech in writing: a phonemic alphabet with word separation using spaces. The question I want to address in this article is how well this attribution method works with texts in a language with a different grammatical structure and a script based on different principles. There are fewer studies analyzing the effectiveness of the Delta method on Chinese texts than on texts in European languages. I believe that such a low level of attention to Delta from sinologists is due to the structure of the scientific field dedicated to medieval Chinese poetry. Clustering based on intertextual distances worked flawlessly. Delta produced results where clustering showed that the samples of one author were most similar to each other, and Delta never confused different poets. Despite the fact that I used an unconventional approach and applied the Delta method to a language poorly suited for it, the method demonstrated its effectiveness. Tang dynasty poets are correctly identified using Delta, and the empirical pattern observed for authors writing in European standard languages has been confirmed once again.
摘要：Burrow‘s Delta于2002年被引入，并被证明是一种有效的作者归因工具。尽管它们是不同的语言，但它们大多属于相同的语法类型，在写作中使用相同的图形原理来传达语音：使用空格分隔单词的音素字母表。我想在本文中解决的问题是，这种归因方法在处理具有不同语法结构和基于不同原则的脚本的语言中的文本时效果如何。分析Delta方法在中文文本上的有效性的研究较少，而在欧洲语言文本上的研究较少。我认为，汉学家对德尔塔的关注程度如此之低，是因为中国中古诗歌科学领域的结构。基于文本间距离的聚类工作得天衣无缝。Delta得出的结果是，聚类显示一个作者的样本彼此最相似，Delta从未混淆过不同的诗人。尽管我使用了一种非传统的方法，并将Delta方法应用于一种不太适合它的语言，但该方法证明了它的有效性。用Delta对唐代诗人进行了正确的识别，用欧洲标准语言写作的作者的经验模式再次得到证实。

[NLP-36] Virtual Agents for Alcohol Use Counseling: Exploring LLM-Powered Motivational Interviewing
[NLP-36] 酒精使用咨询虚拟代理人：探索法学硕士驱动的动机面试

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08095
作者: Ian Steenstra,Farnaz Nouraei,Mehdi Arjmand,Timothy W. Bickmore
关键词: large language models, conducting motivational interviewing, language models, motivational interviewing, application of large
中文关键词: 大型语言模型，进行动机面试，语言模型，动机面试，大型语言的应用
类目: Human-Computer Interaction (cs.HC); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We introduce a novel application of large language models (LLMs) in developing a virtual counselor capable of conducting motivational interviewing (MI) for alcohol use counseling. Access to effective counseling remains limited, particularly for substance abuse, and virtual agents offer a promising solution by leveraging LLM capabilities to simulate nuanced communication techniques inherent in MI. Our approach combines prompt engineering and integration into a user-friendly virtual platform to facilitate realistic, empathetic interactions. We evaluate the effectiveness of our virtual agent through a series of studies focusing on replicating MI techniques and human counselor dialog. Initial findings suggest that our LLM-powered virtual agent matches human counselors’ empathetic and adaptive conversational skills, presenting a significant step forward in virtual health counseling and providing insights into the design and implementation of LLM-based therapeutic interactions.
摘要：我们介绍了大型语言模型（LLM）的一种新颖应用，以开发能够为酒精使用咨询进行动机访谈（MI）的虚拟顾问。获得有效咨询的机会仍然有限，特别是对于药物滥用来说，虚拟代理通过利用LLM功能来模拟MI固有的细致入微的沟通技术，提供了一个有希望的解决方案。我们的方法将即时工程和集成结合到用户友好的虚拟平台中，以促进现实、同理心的互动。我们通过一系列专注于复制MI技术和人类顾问对话的研究来评估虚拟代理的有效性。初步研究结果表明，我们基于LLM的虚拟代理与人类咨询师的同理心和适应性对话技能相匹配，在虚拟健康咨询方面向前迈出了重要一步，并为基于LLM的治疗交互的设计和实施提供了见解。

[NLP-37] RoLoRA: Fine-tuning Rotated Outlier-free LLMs for Effective Weight-Activation Quantization
[NLP-37] RoLoRA：微调旋转无离群值LLM，以实现有效的权重激活量化

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08044
作者: Xijie Huang,Zechun Liu,Shih-Yang Liu,Kwang-Ting Cheng
关键词: Large Language Models, Low-Rank Adaptation, representative Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning, Large Language, Language Models
中文关键词: 大型语言模型、低等级适应、代表性参数高效微调、大型语言、语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), as a representative Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT)method, significantly enhances the training efficiency by updating only a small portion of the weights in Large Language Models (LLMs). Recently, weight-only quantization techniques have also been applied to LoRA methods to reduce the memory footprint of fine-tuning. However, applying weight-activation quantization to the LoRA pipeline is under-explored, and we observe substantial performance degradation primarily due to the presence of activation outliers. In this work, we propose RoLoRA, the first LoRA-based scheme for effective weight-activation quantization. RoLoRA utilizes rotation for outlier elimination and proposes rotation-aware fine-tuning to preserve the outlier-free characteristics in rotated LLMs. Experimental results show RoLoRA consistently improves low-bit LoRA convergence and post-training quantization robustness in weight-activation settings. We evaluate RoLoRA across LLaMA2-7B/13B, LLaMA3-8B models, achieving up to 29.5% absolute accuracy gain of 4-bit weight-activation quantized LLaMA2- 13B on commonsense reasoning tasks compared to LoRA baseline. We further demonstrate its effectiveness on Large Multimodal Models (LLaVA-1.5-7B). Codes are available at this https URL
摘要：低阶自适应(LORA)作为一种具有代表性的参数高效精调(PEFT)方法，通过只更新大语言模型(LLMS)中的一小部分权值，显著提高了训练效率。最近，仅限权重的量化技术也被应用到LORA方法中，以减少微调的内存占用。然而，将权重激活量化应用于LORA流水线的探索不足，我们观察到主要由于激活离群值的存在而导致性能显著下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了RoLoRA，这是第一个基于LORA的有效权重激活量化方案。RoLoRA利用旋转来消除孤立点，并提出了旋转感知的微调来保留旋转后的LLMS的无孤立点特性。实验结果表明，RoLoRA算法在权值激活设置下，能够稳定地改善低位LORA收敛和训练后量化的鲁棒性。我们在LLaMA2-7B/13B和LLaMA3-8B模型上对RoLoRA进行了评估，与LORA基线相比，在常识推理任务上，4位权重激活量化LLaMA2-13B的绝对精度提高了29.5%。我们进一步证明了它在大型多通道模型(LLaVA-1.5-7B)上的有效性。代码可在此HTTPS URL中找到

[NLP-38] Knowledge Overshadowing Causes Amalgamated Hallucination in Large Language Models
[NLP-38] 知识掩盖导致大型语言模型中的混合幻觉

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08039
作者: Yuji Zhang,Sha Li,Jiateng Liu,Pengfei Yu,Yi R. Fung,Jing Li,Manling Li,Heng Ji
关键词: knowledge-intensive tasks, large language models, major impediment, large language, language models
中文关键词: 知识密集型任务、大型语言模型、主要障碍、大型语言、语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Hallucination is often regarded as a major impediment for using large language models (LLMs), especially for knowledge-intensive tasks. Even when the training corpus consists solely of true statements, language models still generate hallucinations in the form of amalgamations of multiple facts. We coin this phenomenon as ``knowledge overshadowing’': when we query knowledge from a language model with multiple conditions, some conditions overshadow others, leading to hallucinated outputs. This phenomenon partially stems from training data imbalance, which we verify on both pretrained models and fine-tuned models, over a wide range of LM model families and sizes.From a theoretical point of view, knowledge overshadowing can be interpreted as over-generalization of the dominant conditions (patterns). We show that the hallucination rate grows with both the imbalance ratio (between the popular and unpopular condition) and the length of dominant condition description, consistent with our derived generalization bound. Finally, we propose to utilize overshadowing conditions as a signal to catch hallucination before it is produced, along with a training-free self-contrastive decoding method to alleviate hallucination during inference. Our proposed approach showcases up to 82% F1 for hallucination anticipation and 11.2% to 39.4% hallucination control, with different models and datasets.
